nasb.text: Though you build high like the eagle, Though you set your nest among the stars, From there I will bring you down,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Though you soar aloft like the eagle, though your nest is set among the stars, from there I will bring you down, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 你雖如鷹高飛， 在星宿之間搭窩， 我也必從那裡把你拉下來。 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 即使你如鹰高飞， 在星辰间筑巢， 我也必把你拉下来。 这是耶和华说的。
